headline: April McClain Delaney Bought Up To 15K Worth of Entegris Stock: Here's What You Should Know
summary: Rep. April McClain Delaney disclosed purchases of Entegris stock and several industrial and healthcare stocks in April, adding semiconductor exposure as AI-driven demand continues to support chip-related companies.
